title: GESTI_Cyper : Gestion innovante du risque phytosanitaire lié à un bio agresseur invasif en cultures légumières
subtitle: COMPTE RENDU FINAL TECHNIQUE DU PROGRAMME D’ACTIONS
description: A final technical report on the 2018–2021 GESTI_Cyper pilot program addressing management of phytosanitary risk from the invasive edible sedge (Cyperus esculentus) in vegetable crops. It details seven actions including eradication strategies, mechanical extraction prototypes, effluent handling in washing lines, sampling methods for residue contamination, and project coordination.
